title: The Clouds: Against the Sophists
description: Aristophanes mocks Socrates as a charlatan who teaches young men to make the worse argument the better.
introduction: Aristophanes mocks Socrates as a charlatan who teaches young men to make the worse argument the better.

translation.text: Come, O Clouds, arise and appear! Whether you sit on Olympus or water the gardens of Ocean — appear!
